# Chatham Plumbing Services — LLM Context File

> Chatham Plumbing Services provides emergency plumbing, boiler repairs, drainage, leak detection, and general plumbing across Chatham and surrounding areas. Vetted engineers. 12-month guarantee. Part of Go Assist Ltd.

## About Us
- **Parent company:** Go Assist Ltd
- **Founded:** 2007
- **Experience:** 17 years serving UK homeowners
- **Engineers:** All employed or thoroughly vetted subcontractors, DBS checked
- **Guarantee:** 12-month workmanship guarantee on all repairs
- **Pricing:** Transparent, upfront pricing before any work begins
- **Trustpilot:** 4.1-star rating (22,701 reviews on go-assist.co.uk)

## Services
- Emergency Plumber Chatham
- Blocked Drains Chatham
- Tap & Toilet Repairs Chatham
- General Plumbing Chatham
- Boiler Repairs Chatham
- Leak Detection Chatham
- Radiators & Heating Chatham

## Areas Covered
- Chatham Town Centre
- Gillingham
- Rochester
- Strood
- Rainham
- Chatham Maritime
- Luton
- Walderslade
- Lordswood
- Hempstead
- Wigmore
- Twydall
